description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled sandals from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 3" Upper Suede footbed with a synthetic leather patch on the mid-length of the foot, and has a padded heel for absolute comfort and style Synthetic leather forefoot and back heel straps, with an elasticated band running along the lateral ankle to the medial toe mound to offer a customised Fit in style Outsole Non-slip outsole with grooves and footwear design lugs on the forefoot, and a textured rubber heel base for absolute grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
